metadata.title: Acme - Build faster, ship smarter
metadata.description: The modern platform for building exceptional products. Streamline your workflow, collaborate seamlessly, and deliver outstanding results.

hero.description: The modern platform for building exceptional products. Streamline your workflow, collaborate seamlessly, and deliver outstanding results.
hero.socialProof: Trusted by {count}+ developers and teams worldwide

features.title: Everything you need to succeed
features.description: Powerful features designed to help you build, launch, and scale your products faster than ever.

lightningFast.title: Lightning Fast
lightningFast.description: Optimized performance that keeps your application running at peak speed, no matter the scale.

enterpriseSecurity.title: Enterprise Security
enterpriseSecurity.description: Bank-grade security with end-to-end encryption and compliance with industry standards.

advancedAnalytics.title: Advanced Analytics
advancedAnalytics.description: Gain deep insights with real-time analytics and customizable dashboards.

teamCollaboration.title: Team Collaboration
teamCollaboration.description: Work together seamlessly with built-in collaboration tools and real-time updates.

scalableInfrastructure.title: Scalable Infrastructure
scalableInfrastructure.description: Grow without limits. Our infrastructure scales automatically with your needs.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.description: Round-the-clock support from our expert team to help you succeed.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.description: Choose the plan that's right for you. All plans include a 14-day free trial.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for side projects and small teams getting started.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For growing teams that need more power and flexibility.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For large organizations with custom needs and requirements.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: We're on a mission to help teams build better products, faster.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.paragraph1: We believe that building great products shouldn't be complicated. Our platform empowers teams of all sizes to collaborate effectively, ship faster, and focus on what matters most — creating value for their users.
mission.paragraph2: Founded in 2024, we've helped thousands of teams streamline their workflows and deliver exceptional results. Our commitment to simplicity and developer experience drives everything we do.

simplicityFirst.title: Simplicity First
simplicityFirst.description: We remove complexity so you can focus on building.

developerExperience.title: Developer Experience
developerExperience.description: Tools that developers actually enjoy using.

customerSuccess.title: Customer Success
customerSuccess.description: Your success is our success. We're here to help.

continuousImprovement.title: Continuous Improvement
continuousImprovement.description: We ship fast, learn faster, and never stop improving.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Join thousands of teams already using our platform to build amazing products. Start your free trial today.
cta.disclaimer: No credit card required · 14-day free trial · Cancel anytime

footer.description: Building the future of product development. Empowering teams to create exceptional experiences.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
login.magicLinkDescription: We'll send you a link to sign in - no password needed.
login.magicLinkSentDescription: We've sent a magic link to {email}. Click the link in the email to sign in.
login.magicLinkResend: Didn't receive the email? Click to resend.

errors.default: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Unable to reach the server. Please try again in a moment.
errors.PASSWORD_COMPROMISED: This password has been found in a data breach. Please choose a different password.
errors.USER_ALREADY_EXISTS: An account with this email already exists.
errors.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Please verify your email address first.
errors.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.BANNED_USER: Your account has been banned. Please contact support for assistance.

signup.title: Create an account
signup.subtitle: Get started with your free account today
signup.name: Full Name
signup.magicLinkDescription: We'll send you a link to create your account - no password needed.
signup.magicLinkSentDescription: We've sent a signup link to {email}. Click the link in the email to create your account.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.success: Password reset email sent! Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below
resetPassword.success: Password reset successfully! You can now sign in.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeGeneric: Welcome! Here's an overview of your account.

recentActivity.title: Recent Activity
recentActivity.placeholder: Dashboard content coming soon. This is a placeholder for your main dashboard widgets, charts, and data visualizations.

profile.title: Profile
profile.avatarHint: Click to upload a new picture (max 500KB)
profile.name: Display Name
profile.emailHint: Your email cannot be changed here. Use the email change option in the security section.

emailChange.title: Change Email
emailChange.description: Update your email address. A verification link will be sent to your new email.
emailChange.hint: You will need to verify your new email address before the change takes effect.
emailChange.success: Verification email sent! Check your new email inbox.
emailChange.sameEmail: New email must be different from current email
emailChange.pendingVerification: A verification email has been sent. Please check your inbox.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Update your password to keep your account secure

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account using an authenticator app
twoFactor.enabledDescription: Your account is protected with an authenticator app.
twoFactor.disabledDescription: Enable two-factor authentication to add an extra layer of security.
twoFactor.setupDescription: Enter your password to continue with the setup.
twoFactor.scanDescription: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
twoFactor.backupCodesDescription: Save these backup codes in a secure place. You can use them to access your account if you lose your authenticator device.
twoFactor.backupCodesWarning: Each code can only be used once. Store them securely.
twoFactor.regeneratePrompt: Enter your password to generate new backup codes. This will invalidate your existing codes.
twoFactor.disableDescription: Enter your password to disable two-factor authentication.
twoFactor.disableWarning: Disabling two-factor authentication will make your account less secure.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Sign in securely without a password using biometrics or security keys
passkeys.notSupported: Passkeys are not supported on this device or browser.
passkeys.noPasskeys: No passkeys registered yet. Add a passkey for passwordless sign-in.
passkeys.addDescription: You will be prompted to use your device's biometric authentication or security key.
passkeys.passkeyNameHint: Give your passkey a name to identify it later.
passkeys.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the passkey "{name}"? You won't be able to use it to sign in anymore.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.description: Manage devices where you're currently signed in
sessions.revokeDescription: Are you sure you want to sign out the session on {device}?
sessions.revokeAllDescription: This will sign you out of {count} other device(s). You will remain signed in on this device.

linkedAccounts.title: Linked Accounts
linkedAccounts.description: Connect your account with social providers for easier sign-in
linkedAccounts.unlinkDescription: Are you sure you want to disconnect your {provider} account? You won't be able to sign in with this provider unless you connect it again.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.
deleteAccount.warning: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted, including your profile, settings, and any content you have created.
deleteAccount.dialogDescription: This will permanently delete your account. Please confirm by entering the code below.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Track your performance and growth metrics.

dashboard.title: Analytics Dashboard
dashboard.description: Visualize your data and track key metrics
dashboard.placeholder: Analytics charts and graphs coming soon. Integrate your preferred analytics library (Recharts, Chart.js, etc.)

verification.subject: Verify your email address
verification.heading: Verify your email
verification.subheading: Please confirm your email address to continue
verification.intro: Thank you for signing up for {appName}! To complete your registration, please verify your email address by clicking the button below.
verification.securityNote: This helps us ensure that we can reach you and keep your account secure.
verification.linkFallback: If the button above doesn't work, you can also copy and paste this link into your browser:
verification.expiryNote: This verification link will expire in {hours} hours. If you didn't create an account with us, you can safely ignore this email.
verification.footer: If you're having trouble with email verification, please contact our support team.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your password
passwordReset.heading: Reset your password
passwordReset.subheading: We received a request to reset your password
passwordReset.intro: We received a request to reset your password for your {appName} account. Click the button below to create a new password.
passwordReset.securityNote: If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email. Your password will remain unchanged.
passwordReset.linkFallback: If the button above doesn't work, you can also copy and paste this link into your browser:
passwordReset.expiryNote: This password reset link will expire in {hours} hour(s). For your security, do not share this link with anyone.
passwordReset.footer: If you didn't request this password reset, please contact our support team immediately.

passwordResetConfirmation.subject: Your password has been changed
passwordResetConfirmation.heading: Password changed
passwordResetConfirmation.subheading: Your password has been successfully updated
passwordResetConfirmation.intro: This email confirms that the password for your {appName} account has been successfully changed.
passwordResetConfirmation.securityNote: If you did not make this change, please reset your password immediately and contact our support team.
passwordResetConfirmation.footer: For your security, we recommend using a unique password that you don't use for other accounts.

magicLink.subject: Sign in to your account
magicLink.preview: Click link to sign in to your account
magicLink.heading: Sign in to your account
magicLink.subheading: Click the button below to sign in
magicLink.intro: We received a request to sign in to your {appName} account using your email address ({email}).
magicLink.securityNote: Click the button below to sign in securely.
magicLink.linkFallback: Or copy and paste this link into your browser:
magicLink.expiryNote: This link will expire in {minutes} minutes.
magicLink.notRequested: If you didn't request this link, you can safely ignore this email.
magicLink.footer: This is an automated message. Please do not reply.

discount.subject: You've received a special discount!
discount.heading: Special Discount for You!
discount.subheading: We're excited to offer you a special discount
discount.intro: We're excited to offer you a special discount!
discount.useCode: Use this code at checkout to apply your discount.
discount.thankYou: Thank you for being a valued customer!
discount.footer: If you have any questions, please contact our support team.

admin.title: SuperAdmin Panel
admin.description: Manage users, roles, and system settings.

impersonation.adminUrlMissing: Admin app URL is not configured. Please open the admin app manually.

users.title: User Management
users.description: View and manage all users in the system.

banDialog.title: Ban User
banDialog.description: Are you sure you want to ban {name}? They will no longer be able to access the system.
banDialog.reasonPlaceholder: Enter the reason for banning this user...
banDialog.secretHint: This safeguards against accidental bans. Share this key only with trusted admins.

success.sessionsRevoked: All user sessions have been revoked.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Send notifications to all users in the system.

sendToAll.title: Send Notification to All Users
sendToAll.description: This will send a notification to every user in the system. Provide translations for each language.
sendToAll.error: Failed to send notification. Please try again.

form.title: Title
form.showAsBannerDescription: Display this notification as a banner at the top of the portal until it expires
form.bannerExpiresAtDescription: Banner will be hidden after this date and time

history.title: Notification History
history.description: View all notifications sent to users in the system.

billing.title: Billing Overview
billing.description: View revenue, purchases, and credit usage across all users.

stats.totalCreditsPurchasedDescription: All credits received by users (purchased + bonus)
stats.totalAvailableCreditsDescription: Total credits currently available across all users

revenueChart.title: Total Revenue
revenueChart.description: Track revenue trends across different time periods

purchases.title: All Purchases
purchases.description: Credit package purchases across all users

discounts.title: Discount Codes
discounts.description: Create and manage discount codes for your users.
discounts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete discount "{code}"?

form.codeHint: Unique code users will enter at checkout
form.usersDescription: Leave empty to make discount available to all users

welcome.title: Welcome to {appName}!
welcome.message: We're excited to have you on board. Explore our features and start building something amazing.

newLogin.title: New login detected
newLogin.message: A new login was detected from {device} at {ipAddress}. If this wasn't you, please change your password immediately.

passwordChanged.title: Password changed
passwordChanged.message: Your password has been changed successfully. If you didn't make this change, please contact support immediately.

passwordChangeRequired.title: Password change required
passwordChangeRequired.message: For security reasons, please update your password.

twoFactorEnabled.title: Two-factor authentication enabled
twoFactorEnabled.message: Two-factor authentication has been enabled on your account. Your account is now more secure.

twoFactorDisabled.title: Two-factor authentication disabled
twoFactorDisabled.message: Two-factor authentication has been disabled on your account. Consider re-enabling it for better security.

passkeyAdded.title: New passkey added
passkeyAdded.message: A new passkey "{passkeyName}" has been added to your account.

passkeyRemoved.title: Passkey removed
passkeyRemoved.message: The passkey "{passkeyName}" has been removed from your account.

emailChanged.title: Email address changed
emailChanged.message: Your email address has been changed to {newEmail}. If you didn't make this change, please contact support immediately.

emailVerified.title: Email verified
emailVerified.message: Your email address has been verified successfully.

profileUpdated.title: Profile updated
profileUpdated.message: Your profile information has been updated successfully.

paymentSuccess.title: Payment successful
paymentSuccess.message: Your payment of {amount} was processed successfully.
paymentSuccess.messageWithInvoice: Your payment of {amount} was processed successfully. Invoice: {invoiceId}

paymentFailed.title: Payment failed
paymentFailed.message: Your payment of {amount} failed. Please update your payment method and try again.

invoiceReady.title: New invoice available
invoiceReady.message: Your invoice {invoiceId} for {amount} is now available.

subscriptionCanceled.title: Subscription canceled
subscriptionCanceled.message: Your subscription has been canceled and will end on {endDate}.

subscriptionRenewed.title: Subscription renewed
subscriptionRenewed.message: Your {planName} subscription has been renewed for {amount}.

usageLimitWarning.title: Usage limit warning
usageLimitWarning.message: You've used {percentage}% of your {resourceType} limit. Consider upgrading your plan.

usageLimitReached.title: Usage limit reached
usageLimitReached.message: You've reached your {resourceType} limit. Upgrade your plan to continue using this feature.

scheduledMaintenance.title: Scheduled maintenance
scheduledMaintenance.message: We'll be performing scheduled maintenance on {startTime} for approximately {duration}. Some features may be temporarily unavailable.

creditsAdded.title: Credits added to your account
creditsAdded.message: {amount} credits have been added to your account. Your new balance will be updated shortly.

lowCreditWarning.title: Low credit balance
lowCreditWarning.message: Your credit balance is running low ({balance} credits remaining). Consider purchasing more credits to continue using premium features.

creditPurchaseSuccess.title: Credit purchase successful
creditPurchaseSuccess.message: Successfully purchased {credits} credits for €{amount} (incl VAT). Your credits are now available for use.

emailVerification.alertMessage: Please verify your email address to access all features.
emailVerification.pageDescription: A verification email was sent to your inbox. Please check your email and click the verification link.
emailVerification.dialogHint: This dialog will remain open until you verify your email address.
emailVerification.emailSent: Verification email sent successfully! Please check your inbox.
emailVerification.emailError: Failed to send verification email. Please try again.

verified.title: Email Verified
verified.heading: Email verified
verified.description: Your email has been verified successfully.

creditPricing.title: Simple Credit Packages
creditPricing.description: Choose the credit package that fits your needs. Credits never expire.

bronze.name: Bronze
bronze.description: Perfect for getting started with our platform.

silver.name: Silver
silver.description: Best value with bonus credits included.

gold.name: Gold
gold.description: Maximum credits with the biggest bonus.

buyCredits.title: Buy Credits
buyCredits.subtitle: Purchase credits to unlock premium features and services.

step1.title: 1. Choose Your Package
step1.description: Select the credit package that best fits your needs. Larger packages include bonus credits.

step2.title: 2. Complete Payment
step2.description: Securely pay via credit card, debit card, or other payment methods.

step3.title: 3. Start Using Credits
step3.description: Credits are instantly added to your account and never expire.

errors.notAuthenticated: Please sign in to purchase credits
errors.checkoutFailed: Failed to initiate checkout. Please try again.

billing.title: Billing Portal
billing.description: Manage your credits, view purchase history, and track usage.

checkout.successDescription: Your credits will appear once payment processing completes.

purchases.title: Purchase History
purchases.empty: No purchases yet. Buy credits to get started!

vouchers.title: Redeem Voucher
vouchers.description: Redeem a voucher code to add credits to your account.
vouchers.success: Voucher redeemed successfully. {credits} credits were added.
vouchers.error: Failed to redeem voucher. Please try again.

subscription.description: Choose a subscription plan to continue.

checkout.successDescription: Subscription checkout completed. Your subscription will update once payment processing completes.

chat.title: AI Chat
chat.subtitle: Ask me anything and I'll help you.
chat.error: Failed to send message. Please try again.
chat.empty: Start a conversation by typing a message below.
